subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí! Upon thee be My glory! Thou art among those souls who, in the earliest days, turned with devotion and quaffed from the chalice of mystic knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی علیک بهائی تو از نفوسی هستی که در اول ایام اقبال نمودی و از کاس عرفان
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @prayer for forgiveness, @consolation and comfort, @call to action, @knowledge; recognition of God, @prayer for prosperity
